description.p: Kirigami interface for uupd-manual.service (Universal Blue/Bazzite updater) with SDL3-powered controller support
The app now uses config files to determine OS-specific information and updates. Defaults for reference are provided in /usr/etc/bazzite-updater.
The app now runs in windowed mode outside of gamescope. All possible instances of "bazzite_updater" have been renamed to "bazzite-updater".

Separated controller support into its own module, "controllable". Properly integrated that separate module. Removed Rebase functionality until it is implemented properly. Fully converted the rollback page to formcards.
The progress bar for the update now becomes indeterminate while an update is running.
Full support and error detection for system update (uupd-manual.service), system rebase (bazzite-rollback-helper), and system rollback (bazzite-rollback-helper).
